mood: Premium, immersive, Midjourney meets enterprise SaaS, cinematic depth, AI-forward.

typography.font_pairings_instructions: Load Cabinet Grotesk for bold, dramatic headers. Use Manrope for high legibility body text. Use JetBrains Mono for tech-centric stats, overlines, and code-like elements.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none

visual_enhancers.parallax_bg: fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-[#C0392B]/10 via-[#050508]/80 to-[#050508] z-[-1]
visual_enhancers.neural_network_nodes: Use Framer Motion or pure CSS keyframes to create small glowing white/red dots connected by 1px opacity-20 lines in the background of the hero.
visual_enhancers.tilt_effect: Implement 3D tilt effect on product cards using Framer Motion (useTransform on mouse move).

components.navigation: Sticky top-0 z-50 transition-all duration-300. Transparent at top, glassmorphism on scroll. Includes Logo ('Rol' in red, 'Play' in white), Links, EN/ES toggle, Social icons.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C0392B] hover:bg-[#A93226] text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(192,57,43,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(192,57,43,0.6)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/10 px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-all

components.cards: Glassmorphism base, 1px subtle border. On hover: border tints red, subtle Y-axis lift, and red ambient shadow. Padding p-8 or p-10.
components.scroll_progress: fixed top-0 left-0 h-1 bg-[#C0392B] z-[60] origin-left
components.whatsapp_orb: fixed bottom-6 right-6 w-14 h-14 bg-[#25D366] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer z-50 animate-pulse shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(37,211,102,0.5)]

Home.hero: Dramatic typography, dual CTAs, neural network abstract bg. Stats counters (91+ Clients, 8,750+ Users) below CTAs. Top 20 badge prominently displayed using an Award icon.
Home.product_grid: 3 cards (Rolplay, Sales Simulator, Virtual Coach) with video placeholder thumbnails, glass layout, 3D hover tilt.
Home.feature_section: 'Why train with AI simulators?'. Bento grid layout. Dark/red contrasts.
Home.testimonial_band: Full width, glowing red particles bg, typewriter animation for the quote.
Home.contact_form: Minimalist form with name/email + Send button in a sleek glass container.

About Us.globe_visualization: Abstract CSS-based globe with pulsating red pins for Toronto, Monterrey, CDMX.

Benefits.header: Massive bold statement: 'Practice the hard parts in private so you don't fail in public'.
Benefits.accordion_cards: Interactive expanding cards for 'Reduction of Bias', 'Multilingual Support', 'Real-Time Insights'.

Achievements.awards: Two recognition awards styled as majestic glass plaques. Video embed placeholder with play button and red glow.

Success Stories.metrics: Massive 3D metallic rank numbers (4th, 2nd). Cinematic scroll reveal.

FAQs.hero: Futuristic dark hero with intersecting red light beams.
FAQs.accordion: Sleek, border-bottom only accordion items. Red plus/minus icons.

Contact Us.info: Grid of locations (Toronto, Monterrey, CDMX). Minimalist icons for email, phone, social. Dark immersive map placeholder.

image_urls.description: Abstract geometric structure with red accents. Use as a low-opacity background layer for the Hero section or FAQs hero.
Dark abstract lines/network. Use for the 'neural network' background feel on the About or Benefits page, heavily darkened.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page application (SPA) using React state (e.g., const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState('Home')) to toggle between the 7 required views/pages.
Implement the sticky navigation globally. It must control the state to switch views.
Include framer-motion for page transitions (fade/slide), scroll-triggered reveal animations (whileInView), and the 3D card tilt effect.
For the molecular network logo, use a text-based approach: `RolPlay` alongside a Lucide `Network` icon.
Use Lucide-React icons heavily (e.g., Award for the Top 20 Badge, MapPin for locations, CheckCircle, MessageCircle for WhatsApp).
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
For video placeholders, use a dark gray div with a subtle red border, an inset shadow, and a centered Play icon.
For the neural network background, implement a pure CSS particle effect using radial gradients and absolute positioning, or Framer Motion floating dots over the provided hero image.
Ensure all copy perfectly matches the requested text from the problem statement.
Apply Framer Motion `useScroll` for the top red progress bar.
